evals.prompt: 确认下目前 claude 存在问题么？检查 https://status.claude.com
evals.expected_output: Directly states whether Claude currently has an official issue, includes absolute check time, summarizes active incidents only if present, and links to official Claude status sources.
expectations: The response answers the current-status question directly.
The response includes absolute timestamps rather than only relative time words.
The response cites the official Claude status page.

evals.prompt: 在检查下：https://status.openai.com 的状态，目前是否有任何影响 Codex
evals.expected_output: Checks the official OpenAI status page, explains whether there is any current official impact relevant to Codex, and avoids treating general OpenAI history as a current Codex outage.
expectations: The response uses status.openai.com as the official source for Codex/OpenAI.
The response distinguishes Codex-specific impact from broader OpenAI status when possible.
The response does not report resolved history as an active incident.

evals.prompt: 顺便一起确认 Claude 和 Codex 现在有没有官方故障，只看官方状态页
evals.expected_output: Checks both official status pages, reports each service separately, includes a fresh timestamp, and stays within official-source confirmation only.
expectations: The response checks both Claude and Codex/OpenAI rather than only one provider.
The response labels the two providers separately.
The response stays within official status-page evidence only.
